title: croton aequatoris
intro: Croton aequatoris, also known as the Ecuadorian croton, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The medicinal properties of Croton aequatoris include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its leaves and roots. This plant is used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and fever, due to its analgesic and antipyretic properties. Herbal preparations of Croton aequatoris include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote healing and alleviate symptoms.
